title: senecio cineraria subsp. bicolor
intro: Senecio cineraria subsp. bicolor, also known as the Dusty Miller or Silver Dollar Plant, is a biennial or perennial plant with silvery-gray leaves and a bi-colored effect, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its saponin and terpenoid content. The health benefits of Senecio cineraria subsp. bicolor include its ability to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant may include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
